definition: Exclamation to express happiness, agreement or freakiness😏.
examples: Pookie #1: Do you want to hang out tonight?, Pookie #2: Blehhhhhh😛
synonyms: I do enjoy what you have just said
What I just did was so crazy freaky
etymology: Unknown. Possible link to Megan Thee Stallion...

definition: To gougi is to tickle someone without their consent.
examples: I dont like it when you gougi me :(
etymology: This word appeared in the summer when the poonies first met. The evil pookie she started tickling the other pookie and he exclaimed 'Don't gougi me!' as a reflex of course. The word stuck and is now a synonym to tickling.

definition: Exclamation to express happiness, excitement, impressedness or satisfaction.
etymology: Unknown. Apparently the pookie has been saying this forever.

definition: Endearing term for your other half, but also, it's her real name now. I do not know what her birth name is... Please someone tell me if you know :)
etymology:
This word has origins in the latin pookie. Then poonie, then lapoonie, and finally lapoona. Obviously. 
First appearance in written text dates back to November 27, 2024.
